title: Google-parent Alphabet ditches nearly 90% of its Robinhood stake
text: Alphabet significantly trimmed the number of Robinhood Markets shares it owns, bringing the total down to around 612,000. It represented a roughly 87.6% reduction.

title: Alphabet sold almost 90% of its Robinhood stake last quarter
text: Alphabet slashed its stake in Robinhood stock by nearly 90% in the second quarter, SEC filings show. The Google parent cut its stake from about 4.9 million shares to about 612,000.

title: Is Google Giving Up on Robinhood (HOOD) Stock?

title: Google parent Alphabet dumps 90% of its stake in struggling Robinhood trading app
text: Following the sale, Alphabet now owns 612,214 shares in the company, worth about $7 million.

title: Alphabet dumps more than 90% of its stake in Robinhood
text: Google parent Alphabet has pared back large positions in multiple publicly traded firms, including the trading platform Robinhood, 23andMe and Duolingo.

title: Google sold 90% of its stake in Robinhood in 2Q — before the app's stock tumbled on underwhelming results
text: Alphabet revealed Friday that it sold nearly 90% of its stake in DIY brokerage app Robinhood during the second quarter The Google parent said it had some 612,214 shares of Robinhood as of June 30, compared with 4.9 million shares in the first quarter ended March 31, according to regulatory findings.  As of Thursday's closing bell, Alphabet's stake would be worth just about $7 million, according to calculations by Reuters.

title: Robinhood had a profitable quarter, so what spooked investors?
text: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD) turned profitable in the second quarter of 2023, following a dark period for the hybrid stocks and cryptocurrency exchange. Granted, earnings per share was a negligible US$0.03, but following EPS of -US$0.19 in the first quarter and quarterly EPS losses as high as -$0.45 in 2022, at least things appear to be heading in the right direction.

title: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) Surpasses Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates

title: Robinhood puts up a surprise profit, but shares fall
